I2C communication and power monitoring tools using INA226 sensors and MCP23009 GPIO expander.


## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: Apache License, Version 2.0, for the power_monitor tool in the pebble-firmware codebase.
- **[i2c.py](i2c.py.md)**: Implements I2C communication using the MPSSE protocol with FTDI chips.
- **[ina226.py](ina226.py.md)**: Implements an INA226 power monitor interface for reading voltage, current, and power via I2C.
- **[mcp23009.py](mcp23009.py.md)**: Implements an interface for the MCP23009 I2C GPIO expander, including setup, configuration, and control functions.
- **[power_monitor.py](power_monitor.py.md)**: Monitors and graphs power rail currents using INA226 sensors, with options for Matplotlib or Bokeh visualization.
